subject: RE: TIEMPO-387 - Approved to proceed
body:
Fulton,

Approved. Proceed with:

1. Create `src/lib/syncFirebaseClaims.js` helper
2. Lookup roles by NAME (not hardcoded IDs) ✓
3. Integrate into BOTH role-modifying endpoints
4. Write migration script for existing SA/SO

Once deployed, let me know and I'll update Firestore rules:
```javascript
allow write: if request.auth.token.admin == true;
```

Sarah already has the token refresh requirement.

—Quinn
